name: stat-card
title: Stat Card
description: Dashboard metric tile with label, value, trend, and sublabel. Compose a row of cards to open any operator surface — engagements, PRs, revenue, latency.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Build cards with statcard.New().WithLabel(...).WithValue(...).WithDelta(...).WithTrend(statcard.TrendUp) and compose a row using lipgloss.JoinHorizontal(lipgloss.Top, c1.View(), c2.View()). WithEmphasis(true) bumps a single tile to primary styling. WithWidth(0) auto-sizes; a positive value fixes outer width and truncates with an ellipsis.
